fact_nuggets.text: Justified (Japanese: Heart of Justice) is an Ability introduced in Generation V.

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Conq. Raises Attack if hit by a Dark-type move. MD GtI The Pokemon's attack goes up each time it's hit by a Dark-type move. * Each time the Pokemon is hit by a Dark-type move, its Attack goes up! * S MD Each time the Pokemon is hit by a Dark-type move, its Attack goes up!

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokemon with Justified is hit by a Dark-type damaging move, its Attack is increased by one stage. This Ability does not provide immunity or reduction to the damage, nor does it activate from a Dark-type move hitting its Substitute . Dark-type multistrike moves (such as Beat Up ) will activate Justified once per strike, increasing the Attack stat that many stages. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Justified has no effect outside of battle.

In battle [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokemon with Justified is hit by a Dark-type damaging move, its Attack is increased by one stage. This Ability does not provide immunity or reduction to the damage, nor does it activate from a Dark-type move hitting its Substitute . Dark-type multistrike moves (such as Beat Up ) will activate Justified once per strike, increasing the Attack stat that many stages.
Raises Attack one stage upon taking damage from a dark move.
